sourceMovie.title: Secret Headquarters
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Secret Headquarters (2022) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Secret Headquarters clicked for you, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1990) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Secret Headquarters?
faq.answer: Try Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension, The Lego Ninjago Movie—each shares DNA with Secret Headquarters while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Secret Headquarters?
faq.answer: Secret Headquarters (2022) is best described as Action, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction, Family. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Secret Headquarters worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
